summary: A new frontend snippet viewer page and reusable code block component were added with copy-to-clipboard controls and a warm amber/orange Tailwind theme. However, the code snippets do not appear to be syntax-highlighted, and several unrelated Internet Identity / actor / React Query scaffolding files were added that were not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the AndroidManifest.xml snippet and Kotlin InstaNotificationService code as formatted, syntax-highlighted code blocks.
missing_requirements.reason: The code blocks render plain text within <pre><code> without any syntax-highlighting library/component or token-based styling shown in the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication provider and related login/identity management hook added.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks for a static snippet viewer UI; no authentication or Internet Identity integration is requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend actor scaffolding and frontend actor hook to create actors with identity/anonymous mode.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not request any backend functionality or actor integration; the UI can be fully static.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query client/provider setup and query invalidation logic added.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not require data fetching/caching; snippets are embedded in the frontend.

hallucinated_features.description: Project metadata includes a new feature request to implement the actual Android NotificationListenerService logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: This contradicts the stated constraints/non-goals (do not implement Android/NotificationListenerService functionality inside this app; do not build an APK or integrate with Android APIs).
